source_name: Steam Community - Fallout 76 Update Notes - April 21, 2026
summary: Official live update notes for April 21 2026: armor durability changes, explosion damage retention, Demolition Expert/bobblehead self-damage behavior, Fancy Pump-Action and Fancy Single Action Revolver tuning, Fierce cost normalization, locked-mod exploit fix, and Pip-Boy perk display fixes.
Stable mirror of the official Steam announcement for the April 21 2026 live update, used for exact patch-note cross-checking.
notes: Official Steam Community notes mirrored by SteamDB.

summary: April 28 maintenance addressed a status-bar display bug and is recorded as no build-impact for perks, weapons, mutations, SPECIAL allocation, and build defaults.
notes: Recorded as no build-impact after April 21 live patch.

summary: Patch 62 perk-system baseline: Bullet Storm heavy rework, melee and bow reworks, Tank Killer applying to all ranged weapons, Stabilized accuracy, Grim Reaper and Psychopath changes, and moved/renamed cards.
notes: Used for perk card names, ranks, costs, and rework semantics.

summary: Current playable ghoul mechanics, including 28 regular ghoul-only perks, 2 ghoul-only legendary perks, feral meter, Glow/radiation mechanics, mutations, and restricted perks.
notes: Primary catalog source for ghoul-only and ghoul-restricted perk handling.

summary: Mutation acquisition/removal, Class Freak, Strange in Numbers, Starched Genes, serum behavior, and Carnivore/Herbivore exclusivity.
notes: Used for mutation support cards and build mutation assumptions.

source_name: Nuka Knights - Build Guide: Archer Katniss Everdeen 3.0
summary: May 2026 bow build guide covering Hat Trick, Bow Before Me, Deal Sealer, stealth multipliers, VATS use, compound bow setup, mutation package, and bloodied/full-health variants.
notes: Used for bow archetype and mutation/gear context.

source_name: Nuka Knights - Dom Pedro Ghoul Bounty Hunter Build
summary: Current ghoul VATS/critical build guide emphasizing Glow management, non-feral play, Toxic Water/Toxic Goo, Dom Pedro revolver setup, and ghoul-specific support choices.
notes: Used for ghoul VATS and gear assumptions.

summary: Build-family taxonomy for melee, heavy gunner, commando, shotgunner, rifleman, pistol, and sub-meta build variants.
notes: Secondary taxonomy and player-facing build index.

source_name: SteamDB - Protect Appalachia PTS Update - April 24, 2026
summary: PTS-only ghoul radiation and Glow adjustments. Tracked for awareness but excluded from live build defaults until released to live servers.
notes: PTS source only; do not apply to live May 6 2026 defaults.
